description_long: This is a two-story modern suburban house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior is clad in light brown brickwork, complemented by white-framed windows arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors. The front features a single-car garage with a white door, a paved driveway, and a small landscaped garden with a tree and shrubs, all enclosed by a dark fence. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by a grassy area and additional fencing for privacy. The house has large windows that allow ample natural light inside, and the overall layout is compact yet functional, suitable for a family in an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical white-framed windows, a garage, landscaped front yard, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entry, landscaped garden with a tree, and the front fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard swimming pool, grassy area, and the rear facade with symmetrical windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, the pool area, and the continuous brick facade with windows.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garden area, tree, and the side wall with windows, with less emphasis on the pool.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door adjacent to a garage, paved driveway, small porch area, and landscaped garden with a tree, all enclosed by a fence.
